languages.text: {n}Лария встречает смерть с улыбкой облегчения и благодарности на лице. Стоящий рядом с вами Себериан отворачивается, но не препятствует Милости Императора, даруемой вами.{/n}
{n}Laria meets death with a smile of relief and gratitude. Seberian, standing beside you, turns away but does not hinder the Emperor's Mercy that you bestow.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Лария встречает смерть с улыбкой облегчения и благодарности на лице. Стоящий рядом с вами Себериан отворачивается, но не препятствует Милости Императора, даруемой вами.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria meets death with a smile of relief and gratitude upon her face. Seberian, standing beside you, turns away but does not hinder the Emperor's Mercy that you bestow.{/n}
{n}Laria meets death with a smile of relief and gratitude upon her face. Seberian, standing beside you, turns away but does not hinder the Emperor's Mercy that you bestow.{/n}
{n}Laria meets death with a smile of relief and gratitude. Seberian, standing beside you, turns away but does not hinder the Emperor's Mercy that you bestow.{/n}
{n}Laria meets death with a smile of relief and gratitude. Seberian, standing beside you, turns away but does not hinder the Emperor's Mercy that you bestow.{/n}

languages.text: {n}菈丽雅带着解脱与感激的微笑迎接死亡。站在你身旁的塞贝里安转过身去，并没有阻止你赐下帝皇的慈悲。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria meets death with a smile of relief and gratitude. Seberian, standing beside you, turns away but does not hinder the Emperor's Mercy that you bestow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}菈丽雅带着解脱与感激的微笑迎接死亡。站在你身旁的塞贝里安转过身去，并没有阻止你赐下帝皇的慈悲。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria enfrenta la muerte con una sonrisa de alivio y agradecimiento. Seberian, a tu lado, aparta la vista pero no interfiere en tu administración de la misericordia del Emperador.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria meets death with a smile of relief and gratitude. Seberian, standing beside you, turns away but does not hinder the Emperor's Mercy that you bestow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria enfrenta la muerte con una sonrisa de alivio y agradecimiento. Seberian, a tu lado, aparta la vista pero no interfiere en tu administración de la misericordia del Emperador.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria s'éteint dans un sourire de soulagement et de gratitude. À vos côtés, Seberian se détourne, mais ne fait rien pour vous empêcher d'octroyer la miséricorde de l'Empereur à sa fille.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria meets death with a smile of relief and gratitude. Seberian, standing beside you, turns away but does not hinder the Emperor's Mercy that you bestow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria s'éteint dans un sourire de soulagement et de gratitude. À vos côtés, Seberian se détourne, mais ne fait rien pour vous empêcher d'octroyer la miséricorde de l'Empereur à sa fille.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria, ölümü rahatlama ve minnettarlık dolu bir gülümsemeyle karşılıyor. Yanında duran Seberian, yüzünü çevirip İmparator'un Merhameti'ni bahşetmene engel olmuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria meets death with a smile of relief and gratitude. Seberian, standing beside you, turns away but does not hinder the Emperor's Mercy that you bestow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria, ölümü rahatlama ve minnettarlık dolu bir gülümsemeyle karşılıyor. Yanında duran Seberian, yüzünü çevirip İmparator'un Merhameti'ni bahşetmene engel olmuyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria stirbt mit einem erleichterten und dankbaren Lächeln. Seberian, der neben dir steht, wendet sich ab, hindert dich aber nicht daran, ihr die Gnade des Imperators zu gewähren.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria meets death with a smile of relief and gratitude. Seberian, standing beside you, turns away but does not hinder the Emperor's Mercy that you bestow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria stirbt mit einem erleichterten und dankbaren Lächeln. Seberian, der neben dir steht, wendet sich ab, hindert dich aber nicht daran, ihr die Gnade des Imperators zu gewähren.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ラリアは安堵と感謝の笑みを浮かべながら死を迎える。あなたに寄り添うセベリアンは顔を背けるが、皇帝の慈悲を妨げることはなかった。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria meets death with a smile of relief and gratitude. Seberian, standing beside you, turns away but does not hinder the Emperor's Mercy that you bestow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ラリアは安堵と感謝の笑みを浮かべながら死を迎える。あなたに寄り添うセベリアンは顔を背けるが、皇帝の慈悲を妨げることはなかった。{/n}
